PE F499.notes: SimEngine 3.1.2 — multi-link layer one-hot report now sized to the layer count.

versions.notes: SimEngine 3.1.2 — multi-link layer one-hot report now sized to the layer count.
SimEngine 3.1.1 stable — multi-link supports up to 20 layers.
Advanced target setting feature + flash save fix.
Fixes phantom button presses when position rotaries + multi-links exceed the 128-button report.
